CustomField.description: Combined summary of the work item operation. Shows relevant details based on work type: DML shows operation and SObject, Events show phase and event type, Flows show phase and API name, Callouts show HTTP method and endpoint, etc. Designed for use in related lists.
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(WorkType__c), "DML", "[" & TEXT(DmlOperation__c) & "] " & SObjectType__c, "EVENT", "[" & ExecutionPhase__c & "] " & SObjectType__c, "FLOW", "[" & ExecutionPhase__c & "] " & FlowApiName__c, "CALLOUT", "[" & ExecutionPhase__c & "] " & "[" & HttpMethod__c & "] " & LEFT(Endpoint__c, 50) & IF(LEN(Endpoint__c) > 50, "...", ""), "EMAIL", "[" & ExecutionPhase__c & "] (" & TEXT(ProcessedCount__c) & " recipients)", "NOTIFICATION", "[" & ExecutionPhase__c & "] " & NotificationType__c, "[" & TEXT(WorkType__c) & "]" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Combined summary of the work item operation. Shows relevant details based on work type: DML shows operation and SObject, Events show phase and event type, Flows show phase and API name, Callouts show HTTP method and endpoint, etc. Designed for use in related lists.
CustomField.label: Operation
